string-array.name: daily_notifications
string-array.item: ⚡ Ready to automate your taps? Let’s go!
🤖 Let your finger rest – we’ve got the clicking covered!
🎯 A perfect tap every time – fire up WallpaperTheme!
⏱️ Time-saving mode: activated!
🚀 Need speed? WallpaperTheme is faster than ever!
💤 Tired of tapping? We’ll do it for you!
🧠 Smart tapping made simple – launch WallpaperTheme now!
🔥 The best auto tapper just got an update – check it out!
📱 Tap less. Win more. Play smarter!
🧲 Magnetic tapping precision – no hands needed!
🎮 Gaming? Grinding? We’ve got your back!
🌙 Night grind? Let WallpaperTheme work while you chill!
👆 Say goodbye to sore thumbs!
🎉 Set it once, tap forever!
💥 Power tap mode is ready – launch the app now!
🔁 Repeating taps made ridiculously easy!
🏆 Dominate your game with perfect timing!
🪄 Automation magic just one tap away!
📈 Boost your productivity with smart tapping!
🛠️ Tap automation, tailored your way!
⛏️ Farming resources? Let us do the tapping!
🎯 Never miss a beat – set your custom taps!
🔋 Light on battery, heavy on results!
🧘 Relax... we’ll handle the taps.
💪 Grind smarter, not harder!
🚨 Your tap assistant is waiting – open the app!
🛸 WallpaperTheme: silent, fast, and unstoppable!
👀 Still tapping manually? There\'s a better way!
🧬 Precision tap control at your fingertips!
🎈 WallpaperTheme’s got a surprise waiting – open now!
